description_long: This is a large, classic executive desk made primarily of dark wood with a green leather or faux-leather writing surface inset on the top. The front side features three columns of drawers, with the central column containing a single wide drawer and the left and right columns each containing three stacked drawers, some of which are shown partially open. The desk is adorned with brass or gold-toned handles on each drawer, adding a touch of elegance and traditional style. The sides of the desk are solid wood panels, while the back is plain and lacks drawers or decorative features. The desk stands on short, sturdy feet and has a substantial, heavy appearance, suitable for professional or formal environments. The overall craftsmanship and finish suggest a high-quality, well-maintained piece of furniture.
description: A large, dark wood executive desk with a green leather writing surface and multiple brass-handled drawers. The design is traditional and elegant, with a solid, heavy build.
description_view_0: Front view showing three columns of drawers, brass handles, and a green writing surface; some drawers are open.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the desk's depth, solid wood panel, and a partially open drawer on the right.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain wood panel and no drawers or decorative features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wood panel and the right-side drawers closed.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and brass handles is intended to face the user, serving as the front, while the plain panel is the back.
attribute_usage_context: executive workspace for writing, paperwork, or computer use
